about.description: With over 2 years of professional excellence and a lifelong passion for beauty, I believe that every woman deserves to see her inner light reflected in the mirror. My journey from a dedicated housewife to a certified beauty expert is fueled by the desire to empower through artistry.

testimonials.subtitle: Kind Words
testimonials.title: Voices of Beauty
testimonials.description: Real stories from our wonderful clients who trusted us with their transformation.

items.name: Geeta
items.content: Archana made me feel like royalty on my wedding day. Her attention to detail is unmatched, and the makeup stayed flawless for 12 hours straight! I couldn't have asked for a better artist for my big day.

items.name: Harshita
items.content: The nail art is pure perfection. I've never seen such precision and creativity in Vadodara. She transformed my simple request into a masterpiece of marble and gold leaf.

items.name: Rajshri
items.content: Her hair styling skills are incredible. My traditional braid with fresh flowers was the talk of the event. Archana has a way of blending tradition with modern grace effortlessly.

items.name: Anjali
items.content: Professional, punctual, and extremely talented. The HD makeup was flawless under the camera lights and looked completely natural in person. Highly recommend her for any professional shoot.

items.name: Rubi
items.content: I booked a party makeup session and was blown away. She really understands different skin tones and textures. I felt so confident and beautiful throughout the evening.

items.name: Pooja
items.content: The studio atmosphere is so serene and welcoming. Archana's personalized care is what sets her apart. She doesn't just apply makeup; she crafts a look that reflects your personality.

items.name: Nisha
items.content: I am so glad I chose Archana for my special day. Her expertise in bridal makeup is evident in the way she enhances natural beauty without making it look heavy. Truly a professional!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services, preparation, and care.

items.question: How should I prepare for my makeup appointment?
items.answer: Please arrive with a clean, moisturized face. Avoid any heavy exfoliation 24 hours before. If you have specific inspiration photos or your outfit/jewelry, having them ready helps us tailor the look perfectly.

items.question: What can I expect during a bridal trial?
items.answer: A trial is a 2-3 hour session where we test different looks, discuss your preferences, and finalize the perfect aesthetic for your big day. We recommend wearing a top similar in color to your bridal outfit.

items.question: How long does a typical hair and makeup session take?
items.answer: For party makeup and styling, expect about 1.5 to 2 hours. Bridal transformations typically take 3 to 4 hours to ensure every detail is flawless.

items.question: Do you offer home services for small groups?
items.answer: Yes! We provide home services for bridal bookings and group packages (3+ people) in Vadodara and Ahmedabad. Travel fees may apply depending on the location.

items.question: What is the best aftercare for gel nail extensions?
items.answer: Avoid using your nails as tools, wear gloves when using harsh chemicals, and apply cuticle oil daily. We recommend a refill every 2-3 weeks to maintain the health of your natural nails.

hero.subtitle: The Heart Behind the Art
hero.title: Meet Archana Singh Chauhan
hero.p1: For over 2 years, my life was a beautiful tapestry woven with the threads of family and home. As a dedicated housewife, I mastered the art of nurturing and the grace of resilience.
hero.quote: My journey from the heart of a home to the pinnacle of beauty expertise is fueled by a simple belief: every woman deserves to see her inner light reflected in the mirror.
hero.p2: Transitioning into the professional beauty industry 2 years ago wasn't just a career shift; it was the awakening of a lifelong passion. Today, I combine my life experiences with refined technical skills to offer a sanctuary of transformation at The Archana Studio.

faq.subtitle: Common Inquiries
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about our services, booking process, and studio policies.

items.a: We specialize in Bridal Makeup, HD Makeup, Engagement and Party Makeup, Hair Styling, Hair Chemical Treatments, Precision Hair Cutting, Nail Art, Saree Draping, and Eyebrow Threading.
Yes, we offer professional home services for bridal and group bookings in Vadodara and Ahmedabad. Please mention your location when inquiring.

items.q: How far in advance should I book for a wedding?
items.a: For bridal services, we recommend booking at least 3-6 months in advance to ensure availability on your special day, especially during the peak wedding season.
We require at least 48 hours' notice for cancellations or rescheduling. Deposits for bridal bookings are non-refundable but may be adjusted for a future date depending on availability.
Yes! We have special Guest Makeup Packages for bridesmaids, family members, and wedding guests. Contact us for group rates.
We use only premium, high-definition professional products from international brands to ensure a flawless, long-lasting look that is safe for all skin types.
